prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位 次持续后移趋势、2026年大幅扩招（+9.6%）、软科排名上升、抖音热度较高、本省考生增加等因素，考虑扩招缓解效应与考生增加、热度上升的 竞争加剧效应相互对冲，预计最低位次约34759名，区间34259–35259名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 20748 → 23144 → 29659 → 29015 → 32672, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 9500 positions in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 32672; the provincial science (physics category) enrollment plans from 2021 to 2025 were 2165, 2167, 2166, 2152, and 2213 respectively, and the 2026 plan is 2426, an increase of 213 students (+9.6%) compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion and helps alleviate competition to some extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; the main ranking of Soft Science has steadily risen from 94th in 2021 to 86th in 2026, with a steady improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition; there are no negative records in the 2026 reputation evaluation; Douyin popularity ranking is 25th (relatively hot), with high short video exposure, reflecting increased attention from applicants; no obvious gaps in admission records; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Guangxi University did not receive A- or above ratings, but as a comprehensive 211, it has traditional advantages in engineering fields such as electrical engineering, civil engineering, and computer science.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication continue to be highly recommended, aligning with the university's advantageous engineering directions, potentially attracting more applicants; the estimated number of physics category candidates in the province in 2026 is about 268,912, an increase of about 3.26% compared to 2025, intensifying competition; in 2026; Guangxi University is located in Nanning City, the only 211 in the province, with a very high proportion of local enrollment (in 2025, 2213 physics category students account for the vast majority of the national total plan), and local candidates have a strong willingness to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the significant expansion in 2026 (+9.6%), the rise in Soft Science rankings, high Douyin popularity, and the increase in local candidates, taking into account the offsetting effects of expansion alleviation and increased competition from candidate growth and rising popularity, the estimated minimum ranking is about 34759, with a range of 34259–35259.
